title: COMPABILITY FIXES For Cutting Edge V2
description: Compability Fixes For GUI'S Perfected To Add Mod Support For The Resource Pack.
body:
## About The Resource Pack: [(View Gallery To See Actual Examples)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compabilityfixesforguiperfected/gallery)

**This Pack Adds Some Compability Fixes (Mod Support) To Cutting Edge 2.0 Made Originally By **[Ragon](https://modrinth.com/user/Ragon)****
![The Resource's Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3X7ogiba/images/820e2591c91e6f1cc88684c4320d6530e547d6c6.png)
**(Made To Be Used With [**Cutting Edge 2.0**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-perfected) )**

## **Textures Are Currently Changed For:**
> [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

> [**Detail Armor Bar**](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar)

> [**[ETF] Entity Texture Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

## **Check Out The [GitHub Page](https://github.com/ImZek11/Compability-FIXES-For-GUI-S-Perfected)**
**In The GitHub Page You Can:**
> - **Submit Issues or Bugs Found**
 
> - **Recommend More Mods To Be Added To Compability Fixes**
